div.head: The Ambassador in Brazil (Caffery) to the Secretary of State

opener.dateline:
Rio de Janeiro, April 20, 1942—10 p.m.
[Received April 21—4 a.m.]

div.p: 1351. From statement made by Friedrich Kempter, OLIR group, it appears that Otis, Berko and Tannin of Buenos Aires are respectively Ottomar Mueller, Walter Napp and Walter Freiwald; that Hiag of São Paulo is Joseph Karl Eisenhammer; and that Kempter contacted Elvezio Ortelli, a Swiss citizen, in Buenos Aires in September 1940. Please inform F. B. I. immediately.
